decisions.SD-1_idp_mfa_scope: DEFER — Authentik OIDC, Google one-tap, MFA are NOT in this requirement; build the app-native slice. Each becomes a separate child requirement.
decisions.SD-2_refresh_tokens: ADD NOW — Postgres-backed rotating refresh tokens (15-min access + 7-day refresh) + /auth/token/refresh.
decisions.SD-3_revocation: REVOKE ON ALL CHANGES — any role/permission change or remove/suspend instantly revokes affected sessions (immediate revocation, non-negotiable).
